_readme: Authoritative brand list for the OEM library (Cycle 3). 'name' spellings are corrected and final. 'slug' is the new canonical URL under /brands/. 'legacy_slugs' are ONLY the slugs actually observed on the live site during the audit; run the Cycle 3 crawl task to confirm/extend before generating redirects. 'merge_into' means that legacy page consolidates into another brand page. Never render a name not in this file.

brands.name: Alfa Laval / Sharples
brands.note: Keep only if content is distinct; otherwise merge_into alfa-laval with 301. Decide during Cycle 3 content review.

brands.name: ATM (DeLaval)
brands.note: Two legacy entries point at the same lineage; consolidate to one page.

brands.name: Bird / Andritz
brands.note: Candidate to merge_into bird; decide in Cycle 3.

brands.name: Centrisys
brands.note: A Centrisys page also lives in the Services menu on legacy site; consolidate to one brand page, keep a service cross-link.

brands.name: Contrubex
brands.note: TODO(verify: brand spelling with client — uncommon name, confirm before publishing)

brands.name: Dorr-Oliver / Merco
brands.note: Second legacy slug is a duplicate/typo page — 301 it.

brands.name: Heinkel
brands.note: Two legacy Heinkel pages — merge to one, 301 the weaker.

brands.name: Heraeus
brands.note: Legacy nav anchor for this page was a generic sentence; new page must be titled Heraeus.

brands.name: Hutchison Hayes
brands.note: Second slug is a misspelled duplicate — 301 it.

brands.name: Ketema / Tolhurst
brands.note: Candidate to merge with tolhurst; decide in Cycle 3.

brands.name: Veronesi

brands.name: GEA Westfalia
brands.note: Two legacy Westfalia pages — merge to one at /brands/westfalia/, 301 both.
